mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_h5_visitor_device WHERE device_token = #{deviceToken} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_h5_visitor_device ( device_token, first_client_uid, latest_client_uid, first_user_id, latest_user_id, first_ip, latest_ip, ua_hash, user_agent, anonymous_chat_attempt_count, anonymous_conversation_create_count, anonymous_character_create_count ) VALUES ( #{deviceToken}, #{firstClientUid}, #{latestClientUid}, #{firstUserId}, #{latestUserId}, #{firstIp}, #{latestIp}, #{uaHash}, #{userAgent}, #{anonymousChatAttemptCount}, #{anonymousConversationCreateCount}, #{anonymousCharacterCreateCount} )
mapper.update: UPDATE app_h5_visitor_device SET last_seen_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, first_client_uid = CASE WHEN (first_client_uid IS NULL OR first_client_uid = '') AND #{latestClientUid} IS NOT NULL AND #{latestClientUid} != '' THEN #{latestClientUid} ELSE first_client_uid END, latest_client_uid = CASE WHEN #{latestClientUid} IS NULL OR #{latestClientUid} = '' THEN latest_client_uid ELSE #{latestClientUid} END, first_user_id = CASE WHEN first_user_id IS NULL AND #{latestUserId} IS NOT NULL THEN #{latestUserId} ELSE first_user_id END, latest_user_id = CASE WHEN #{latestUserId} IS NULL THEN latest_user_id ELSE #{latestUserId} END, first_ip = CASE WHEN (first_ip IS NULL OR first_ip = '') AND #{latestIp} IS NOT NULL AND #{latestIp} != '' THEN #{latestIp} ELSE first_ip END, latest_ip = CASE WHEN #{latestIp} IS NULL OR #{latestIp} = '' THEN latest_ip ELSE #{latestIp} END, ua_hash = CASE WHEN #{uaHash} IS NULL OR #{uaHash} = '' THEN ua_hash ELSE #{uaHash} END, user_agent = CASE WHEN #{userAgent} IS NULL OR #{userAgent} = '' THEN user_agent ELSE #{userAgent} END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_h5_visitor_device SET anonymous_chat_attempt_count = anonymous_chat_attempt_count + 1, last_seen_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_h5_visitor_device SET anonymous_conversation_create_count = anonymous_conversation_create_count + 1, last_seen_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_h5_visitor_device SET anonymous_character_create_count = anonymous_character_create_count + 1, last_seen_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
